hero.title: Industrial supervision accessible to every company.
hero.subtitle: Wiregrid centralizes data from PLCs, sensors and meters into an open database, immediately usable in Power BI, Grafana or Excel.

values.title: A different approach to supervision
values.simple_desc: Wiregrid installs in minutes on a standard server. No dedicated infrastructure, no prior integration work. The platform is operational from day one.
values.open_desc: All measurements are stored in PostgreSQL, a global standard. Connecting Power BI, Grafana, Excel or any analytics tool requires no development, no export, no middleware.
values.affordable_desc: No per-tag licensing, no five-figure entry cost. A free version allows validating the need before any commitment. Moving to production comes at a predictable price.

features.title: Platform capabilities
features.drivers_desc: Native support for Modbus TCP, OPC-UA and BACnet/IP. Compatible with Siemens, Schneider Electric, Wago, ABB and most field equipment.
features.live_desc: Web-based supervision interface accessible from any browser. Live values, operating states and performance indicators, with write capability on controllable points.
features.wiresheet_desc: Graphical function block editor for creating automations: PID control, conditional sequences, timers, calculations. No programming skills required.
features.historian_desc: Automatic recording of all measurements in TimescaleDB. History lookup, trend charts and on-demand data export.
features.integrations_desc: The PostgreSQL database enables direct connection from Power BI, Grafana, Metabase or Excel. Business teams build their own dashboards without IT involvement.
features.alarms_desc: Per-point threshold configuration. Notifications on overrun, fault or drift. Complete event log for traceability and quality monitoring.

demo.title: Explore the interface
demo.desc: The demo environment replicates an industrial site with simulated equipment: air handling units, energy meters and temperature probes.
